ab: kyan utux gluw m’was biru mu ga Hayung, heya ga ryax ryax mungi maras y’aya nya.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Hayung，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Hayung, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: tkba biru cami ga, ksiyu kryax gluw m’was biru bbrwan, ccong ini ga bbiru lban.
ch: 上課的時候，他常跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: te utux, te sa’ing, te tugan ga, syugan naha heya kwara.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ana ga kyan utux ya’eh scu nya, ksiyu y’aya naha lga ini nya wahiy matu kryax.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: suruw nya lga ini naha ksyugiy y’aya naha la.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: kyan utux ryax, mlu cami mosa mtisan kwara myan.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: maki tu’i ga, smoya mosa stanux Hayung haca, ana ga waya mungi maras lban ccong nya.
ch: 路途中，Hayung想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Hayung wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: heya ga aki cyu smoya ksiyu lban ccong gluw m’was biru, ana ga kmayan kwara naha maha, ini cami aras uyi.
ch: 他想跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我們也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: memaw sktan ci ru ngilis Hayung haca. ms’ang kmayan heya maha, ca cu nya ini ksyugiy lban ccong kwara naha!
ch: Hayung急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Hayung burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: gluw m’was biru ga kyalun nya heya maha, baha mcwa ini su aras nanak, ini ga ksiyu su y’aya naha lga, ini su wahiy matu la.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: kcuxan nya ga mwah m’was biru, mgebu ci mwah pwasan briu Hayung haca, kwara knsyugan nya y’aya ga waya nya halan matu gluw m’was biru kwara.
ch: 隔天上學，Hayung很早就到學校了，Hayung把全部所借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Hayung arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: mkura gluw m’was biru tmatuk tunux Hayung haca, kmayan maha babaw nya ga p’aras cu nanak y’aya mu, shway nya kwara gluw m’was biru waya smwa’ing ksiyu heya kwara y’aya naha lela.
ch: Hayung向同學們道歉，並說以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Hayung apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
